artifact_refs.description: Evidence-only notebook used to inspect the Elo data and freeze a plain-language shortlist before bank alignment.
Authoritative shortlist-to-bank mapping for the Elo human baseline.
Author notes for the Elo human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the Elo human baseline.
Links each selected bank action to notebook evidence or worksheet sections.

notes: Manual Elo TC1 baseline. The final selection keeps the card-age block, simple base-card encodings, `month_diff`, and the numeric aggregation path on both transaction tables while stopping before the transaction-flag cleanup branch.
